Home / Free Tech Pack Template

Free Tech Pack Template for Clothing Manufacturing

Updated: July 2026 | Used by 500+ brands at FABRIOZA

A tech pack is the most important document in clothing manufacturing. It's the blueprint that tells your factory exactly what to make, how to make it, and what materials to use. Without a proper tech pack, you risk miscommunication, production errors, and costly revisions.

At FABRIOZA, we receive hundreds of inquiries from brands who aren't sure how to create a tech pack. So we built this free template based on the exact format our production team uses daily. Download it, fill it in, and send it to any manufacturer — including us.

Request Free Tech Pack Template →

We'll email you the template within 24 hours

What's Inside the Template

FABRIOZA Tech Pack Template — Preview

1. GARMENT INFORMATION
Style Name: _________________________
Style Number: _________________________
Season: _________________________
Target Delivery: _________________________
2. TECHNICAL FLAT SKETCH
[Attach front and back line drawing]
Label all seams, pockets, zippers, and details
3. MEASUREMENT SPECIFICATIONS (in cm)
Size Range: XS / S / M / L / XL / XXL
Chest (1/2): ___ | ___ | ___ | ___ | ___ | ___
Body Length: ___ | ___ | ___ | ___ | ___ | ___
Sleeve Length: ___ | ___ | ___ | ___ | ___ | ___
Shoulder Width: ___ | ___ | ___ | ___ | ___ | ___
Neck Opening: ___ | ___ | ___ | ___ | ___ | ___
Hem Width: ___ | ___ | ___ | ___ | ___ | ___
4. FABRIC SPECIFICATIONS
Main Fabric: _________________________
Composition: _________________________
GSM/Weight: _________________________
Color (Pantone): _________________________
Supplier (if known): _________________________
5. TRIMS & NOTIONS
Thread Color: _________________________
Labels: Woven / Printed / Heat Transfer
Buttons/Zippers: _________________________
Drawstrings: _________________________
Elastic: _________________________
6. CONSTRUCTION DETAILS
Stitch Type: _________________________
Seam Allowance: _________________________
Hem Finish: _________________________
Special Instructions: _________________________
7. ARTWORK & DECORATION
Decoration Type: Screen Print / Embroidery / Sublimation / None
Artwork File: _________________________
Placement: _________________________
Size: _________________________
Colors: _________________________
8. PACKAGING
Poly Bag: Standard / Custom Printed
Hang Tag: Yes / No — Design: _________________________
Folding: _________________________

Tech Pack Checklist

  • Front and back technical sketches included
  • All measurements specified for every size
  • Fabric composition and GSM listed
  • Color specified (Pantone code preferred)
  • All trims and notions documented
  • Construction details (stitch type, seam allowance)
  • Artwork placement and dimensions noted
  • Packaging requirements specified
  • Special instructions or notes added

Do You Need a Tech Pack?

Your SituationNeed Tech Pack?
You have complete designs readyYes — speeds up production significantly
You have sketches or reference photosWe can help — send us what you have
You have a physical reference garmentSend it — we'll reverse-engineer the specs
Basic t-shirt with simple logoNot required — we use standard specs

How FABRIOZA Helps Without a Tech Pack

If you don't have a tech pack yet, we can work from:

  • Reference garments: Send us a piece you love, we'll replicate and modify
  • Sketches or mood boards: Our design team interprets your vision
  • Pinterest boards: We understand aesthetic direction from references
  • Detailed descriptions: "Boxy fit, 280gsm cotton, dropped shoulder, chest embroidery"

Tech Pack Software We Recommend

  • Adobe Illustrator — Industry standard for flat sketches
  • Techpacker — Online tech pack tool, beginner-friendly
  • Clo3D — 3D garment simulation (premium)
  • Google Sheets + Illustrator — Free DIY approach

Need Help Creating Your Tech Pack?

Send us whatever you have — sketch, photo, or description. Our design team will guide you through the process or create specs for you.

Get Free Tech Pack Assistance
